questionText: How can we all be healthy
design: 3 topics × 4 synths × 5 paraphrases = 60 (TIGHT: high within-synth lexical overlap so cosine clears the 0.94 auto-accept band; realistic restatements, synths kept distinct)

synths.name: daily-cardio
paraphrases: Do daily cardio exercise such as running or cycling.
Do daily cardio exercise such as running and cycling.
Do daily cardio exercise like running or cycling.
Do daily cardio workouts such as running or cycling.
Do daily cardio exercise such as jogging or cycling.

synths.name: strength-training
paraphrases: Do regular strength training with weights to build muscle.
Do regular strength training using weights to build muscle.
Do regular strength training with weights to gain muscle.
Do regular weight training with weights to build muscle.
Do regular strength training with weights for building muscle.

synths.name: flexibility-stretching
paraphrases: Do daily stretching exercises to improve flexibility.
Do daily stretching exercises to increase flexibility.
Do daily stretching routines to improve flexibility.
Do daily stretching exercises to improve your flexibility.
Do daily stretching exercises to boost flexibility.

synths.name: active-commuting
paraphrases: Walk or bike to work instead of driving.
Walk or cycle to work instead of driving.
Walk or bike to work rather than driving.
Walk or bike to work instead of taking the car.
Walk or bike to your job instead of driving.

synths.name: eat-vegetables
paraphrases: Eat more vegetables and fruit every day.
Eat more vegetables and fruits every day.
Eat more vegetables and fruit each day.
Eat plenty of vegetables and fruit every day.
Eat more fresh vegetables and fruit every day.

synths.name: limit-sugar
paraphrases: Cut back on sugar and sugary drinks.
Cut back on sugar and sugary beverages.
Cut down on sugar and sugary drinks.
Cut back on added sugar and sugary drinks.
Reduce sugar and sugary drinks in your diet.

synths.name: stay-hydrated
paraphrases: Drink plenty of water every day.
Drink plenty of water each day.
Drink plenty of water throughout the day.
Drink plenty of fresh water every day.
Drink plenty of water daily.

synths.name: portion-control
paraphrases: Eat smaller portions to control how much you eat.
Eat smaller portions to limit how much you eat.
Eat smaller portions to manage how much you eat.
Eat smaller food portions to control how much you eat.
Eat smaller portions to control how much food you eat.

synths.name: annual-physical
paraphrases: See your doctor every year for a checkup.
See your doctor each year for a checkup.
See your doctor every year for a health checkup.
Visit your doctor every year for a checkup.
See your doctor annually for a checkup.

synths.name: vaccinations
paraphrases: Keep your vaccines up to date.
Keep your vaccinations up to date.
Keep your vaccines current and up to date.
Keep all your vaccines up to date.
Keep your shots and vaccines up to date.

synths.name: dental-checkups
paraphrases: Visit the dentist regularly for checkups.
Visit the dentist regularly for checkups and cleanings.
See the dentist regularly for checkups.
Visit the dentist regularly for dental checkups.
Visit the dentist regularly for routine checkups.

synths.name: self-monitoring
paraphrases: Check your blood pressure at home regularly.
Check your blood pressure at home often.
Monitor your blood pressure at home regularly.
Check your own blood pressure at home regularly.
Regularly check your blood pressure at home.
